narrative:
Mtta East D (precinct in Washington County) has 940 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.3 percentage points.
